form.formComment: Is fourth-up today and making a debut in a jumps race. Gets a chance to win. Can win again.

form.formComment: Recent form hard to fault. Last start tracked on the speed and boxed on steadily finished second of 9 runners at Albury Bm66 on March 20 over 2400m, slow track; 0.5 len behind Lightning Flash carrying 61kg at $4. The start before that; favourite; tracked on the speed and boxed on steadily; won by 2 len Ararat Bm56 on March 3 over 2200m on rain affected going defeating What A Cross with 62.5kg at $4.60. Go close. Good run on the flat latest and worth including this line-up.
